close_reason: Implemented complete staleness detection in go/pkg/staleness/ with support for Go, Rust, and Python. Includes source file tracking, import/use statement parsing, and hash-based caching for performance.
description:
Detect when BUCK files need regeneration due to source changes.

Triggers:
- New source files added to package
- Source files deleted from package
- Import statements changed (new deps)

Challenges:
- Need to parse source files to detect import changes
- Different logic per language (Go imports, Rust use, Python import)
- Must be fast enough to run on every build

Consider: hash-based detection of source file list + imports
title: BUCK file staleness detection
